name: ai-context
description: Persistent AI session memory — injects architecture and session state so agents orient instantly without re-auditing the codebase on every conversation.

commands.title: AI Context: Clean Up Archived Contexts
AI Context: Save Context as Template
AI Context: New Context From Template
AI Context: Install Claude Code Hook
AI Context: Uninstall Claude Code Hook

aiContext.projectsRoot.description: Root folder scanned for projects. Defaults to ~/projects.

aiContext.agents.description: Which agent instruction files to inject context into.

aiContext.autoDetect.description: Automatically detect and switch the active context based on the open file or terminal CWD.

aiContext.followActiveEditor.description: Switch active context when the focused editor moves to a file in a different project.

aiContext.followTerminalCwd.description: Switch active context when the active terminal changes to a different project directory.

aiContext.scanOnLaunch.description: Scan projectsRoot on startup and auto-create missing context entries.

aiContext.showNotifications.description: Show toast notifications for context switches and updates.

aiContext.autoGitignore.description: Automatically add agent instruction files to .gitignore.

aiContext.maxActions.description: Maximum recent actions to keep before compacting into history.

aiContext.contextDir.description: Override the default context store directory (~/.ai-context).

aiContext.architectureMaxAgeDays.description: Number of days before architecture state is considered stale and the agent is asked to re-audit.

aiContext.preventRemovalCapture.description: Do not auto-capture destructive shell commands (rm, DROP TABLE, git reset --hard, etc.) into the permission allow-list.
